title: 2D Platformer (working title)
subtitle: Game - TBA (maybe)
description: A casual puzzle platformer I'm building in my spare time with Godot. A good excuse to explore the engine's component-based philosophy hands-on, and to attempt pixel art (which, as a programmer, is probably the real challenge here).

title: Dynamic Avoidance
subtitle: Unreal Engine Plugin - 2025
description: A dynamic obstacle avoidance plugin for Unreal Engine. Born out of the AI driving system I built for Warhammer 40,000: Speed Freeks, then cleaned up and generalized into a single-component plugin that plays nice with UE's built-in nav system.

title: Nav Link Editor Mode
subtitle: Unreal Engine Plugin - 2024
description: A nav link editor plugin for Unreal Engine, made for Warhammer 40,000: Speed Freeks to speed up navmesh iteration. It lets you visually place and edit nav links without triggering rebuilds until you're ready.

title: Auto Nav Link Generator
subtitle: Unreal Engine Plugin - 2024
description: An automatic nav link generator for Unreal Engine. It detects navmesh edges in your level and creates navigation links based on the parameters you define. Supports multiple nav agents, so it works with levels that have different recast navmeshes.

title: Oneiric
subtitle: Game - 2018
description: A puzzle-platformer I made with a friend for GitHub's Game Off 2018. The theme was 'Hybrid', so we went dark: Inside, Limbo, and Little Nightmares were the references, but with a character torn between two natures: half human, half lifeless shell.

title: Fight & Win
subtitle: Game - 2016
description: A 1v1 fighting game, built during a weekend hackathon, where it ended up taking second place. The whole client runs on HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript, with NodeJS and Socket.IO handling the multiplayer server-side.
